summary: Verified all UI wording changes for employee status language standardization. All frontend changes implemented correctly - no backend changes required.
passed_tests: ✅ Employee list columns: Employee, Role, Work Status, File Status, Progress, Actions - ALL CORRECT
✅ Work Status labels: 'Ready to Work', 'Supervised Start', 'Not Ready' - ALL CORRECT
✅ File Status labels: 'Incomplete', 'Nearly Complete', 'Complete' - ALL CORRECT
✅ Employee profile header: 'Progress' label (not 'Compliance Score') - CORRECT
✅ Employee profile header: 'File Status: Incomplete/Complete' badge - CORRECT
✅ Employee profile: 'Bulk Upload' button removed - CORRECT
✅ Overview cards: Work Status, Recruitment File, Policies, Progress - ALL CORRECT
✅ Overview cards microcopy: All supporting text correct
✅ Olakunle Alonge: Work Status='Ready to Work', Progress='47% Complete'
✅ Lawrence Egbeni: Work Status='Not Ready', Progress='21% Complete'
✅ Ayomi Lori: Work Status='Ready to Work', Progress='46% Complete'

card_1.label: Work Status
card_1.microcopy: Shows whether this employee can safely start work.

card_2.label: Recruitment File
card_2.microcopy: Shows whether the employee record is complete.

card_3.label: Policies
card_3.microcopy: Shows whether assigned policies have been read and acknowledged.

card_4.label: Progress
card_4.microcopy: Shows how much of the employee record is complete.

critical_code_review_comments: All UI wording changes implemented correctly per specification
Work Status, File Status, and Progress labels are standardized across the portal
Bulk Upload button correctly removed from employee profile (comment in code explains it should be done from bulk actions screen)
Overview cards use correct labels and microcopy
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI wording standardization complete. Employee list shows: Employee, Role, Work Status, File Status, Progress, Actions columns. Work Status uses: Ready to Work, Supervised Start, Not Ready. File Status uses: Incomplete, Nearly Complete, Complete. Progress shows X% Complete format. Employee profile header shows 'Progress' instead of 'Compliance Score' and includes File Status badge. Bulk Upload button removed from employee profile. Overview cards use standardized labels: Work Status, Recruitment File, Policies, Progress with correct microcopy.
